description_long: This object is a vintage-style gramophone stereo sound system, featuring a large, flared, metallic horn in a dark bronze or copper color. The horn is attached to a rounded, white main body adorned with musical note motifs, giving it a whimsical and decorative appearance. The base consists of a wooden pallet, supporting a black turntable platform with visible tonearm and stylus components. The turntable area includes several metallic and plastic elements, such as knobs and levers, suggesting manual operation. The overall design blends classic gramophone aesthetics with playful, modern artistic touches, making it a striking piece for urban or public spaces. The materials and construction evoke a sense of nostalgia while serving as a functional or decorative sound system.
description: A vintage gramophone-style stereo sound system with a large bronze horn, white body with musical notes, and a wooden pallet base. The design combines classic and whimsical elements for urban display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full curve of the bronze horn, the white body with musical notes, and the wooden pallet base.
description_view_1: Profile view highlighting the depth of the horn and the turntable platform, with visible levers and stylus.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide opening of the horn, the musical notes on the body, and the central placement of the turntable.
description_view_3: Opposite profile view showing the horn's rear curve, the white body, and more detail of the turntable's controls.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A few knobs and levers are present on the turntable platform, arranged in a simple, accessible layout without visible labels.
